name: harness.debug_map_editor_field_furniture_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit one debug map-editor field/furniture primitive end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: paint a distinctive furniture/field pair onto the target tile through the debug map editor, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved-map metadata for the exact field and furniture. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_map_editor_place_chair_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug map-editor primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug map editor returns to the live map after selecting f_chair and applying it to the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: one f_chair should exist on the saved target tile one square east, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-map metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-map f_chair metadata after save makes this debug map-editor row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug map-editor furniture primitive unless audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor is green

steps.label: debug_map_editor_place_smoke_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture remains loaded and focused; debug map-editor field primitive starts from the main map screen after the furniture paint helper exits
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug map editor returns to the live map after selecting fd_smoke and applying it to the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: fd_smoke should exist on the saved target tile one square east along with f_chair, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-map metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-map fd_smoke metadata after save makes this debug map-editor row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug map-editor field primitive unless audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_map_editor_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug map-editor field/furniture placement and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_map_editor
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug map-editor save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug map-editor field/furniture steps; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_map_editor
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved-map field/furniture metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_map_editor_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_map_editor_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug map-editor save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug map-editor save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_map_tile_after_debug_map_editor
steps.abort_reason: saved-map metadata did not contain fd_smoke and f_chair at player-relative offset [1,0,0] after same-run debug map-editor save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved-map metadata contains fd_smoke and f_chair one tile east of the player after the debug map-editor primitive
